titleStmt.title: SII 15.14: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 14. (A.R. No. 461 of 1926.) SIDDHĀPUR, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in front of the Śiva-maṇḍapa.

The record contains two dates. The first is Śaka 1056, Ānanda, Pushya-amāvāsyā, solar eclipse, Sunday, corresponding to 1135 A.D., January 16. The week-day, however, was Wednesday. The second date is Chālukya-Vikrama year 10, Dundubhi, Āshāḍha śu. 8, Monday, corresponding to 1082 A.D., June 6.

The first section of the inscription containing the first date, recounts the Kadamba praśasti and states that Jayakēśi II of the Goa Kadamba family along with his queen Maiḷala-mahādēvī, was governing the kingdom from the nelevīḍu of Bhōgūru. While citing the date it makes a passing reference to Bhūlōka, i.e., Bhūlōkamalla.
It registers a gift of vṛittis owned by him to the god Mūlasthāna of Posavoḷal by Haḷḷagāvuṇḍa after washing the feet of Nāgarāsi-paṇḍita, son of Dēvarāsi-paṇḍita.
The second section coming at the end and citing the second date, registers a similar gift to the same deity. This seems to be a renewal of an earlier transactionThe donor is•

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

navāsipuravarādhīsvara samastabhuvanasaṁstūyamā
na haradharaṇīprasūta triḷōcanakadaṁbavaṁśamahōdaya mahīdha
rēṁdraśikharābhyudayamānamahāpracaṁṇḍa mā¨rttaṇḍa mā¨rttaṇḍakarātitī
branijapratāpa vaśīkritasakaḷamahīmaṇḍaḷanuttuṁgasiṁghalāṁcana
vānaramahādhvaja pe¨rmmaṭṭitū¨ryyani¨rgghōṣaṇa caturāsītinagarādhiṣṭitāṣṭā
dasāsvamēdhadīkṣādīkṣitakuḷaprasūta himavadugirīṁdraruṁdrasikharastā
pitamahāśaktiprabhāva tyāgajagajhaṁpa jaṁpaḷācā¨ryya subhaṭakanakanikha
sōpaḷa saraṇāgatavajraprākāra lōkaiykakaḷpadruma saṁkrāṁtidhavaḷa mū
¨rttinārāyaṇa kī¨rttimā¨rttaṁḍa maṁḍaḷikalalāṭapaṭṭa vairigaraṭṭa subhaṭa
rājasikhāmaṇi kādaṁbacūḍāmaṇītyakhiḷarājāvaḷīsamāḷaṁkritarappa
śrīmajjayakēsidēvaruṁ maiḷalamahādēviyaruṁ bhōgūranelevīḍinoḷu su
khasaṁkhatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamiralu . svastiyamaniyamasvādhyāya
dhyāna dhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhāṇa japa samādhi sīḷasaṁpannarappa posavoḷa
la pramukha dhannēsvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaroḷagāgi nāluvaru prabhugaḷe
ṟiyalu . svasti śrī cāḷukya bhūlōka sakhavarisa 1056 neya Ānaṁda saṁva
tsara posavoḷala śrīmūlastānadēva¨rgge Eraḍu puḷḷa raḍiya tannanijavritti
yoḷage mūliga haḷḷagāvuṁḍa pausyadamavāsa sū¨ryyagrahaṇa Āditya
vāradaṁdu dēvarāsipaṁḍitara magaṁ nāgarāsipaṁḍitare kāla ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvva
kaṁ māḍi koṭṭa sa¨rvvabādhaparihāraṁ māḍi koṭṭa caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbara I dha¨rṁmamanā
vano¨rvva pratipāḷisidava¨rgge Āyuṁ śrīyuṁ peccu tikke I dha¨rmmamanāvano¨rvva
Aḷidavaruṁ gaṁge vāraṇāsiyoḷage pasuvaṁ pā¨rvvanaṁ sisu risiyaṁ konda pātaka
na pōda lokakke pōparu . bahubhi¨rvvasudhā dattā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya
yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadāphaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śa
ṣṭi¨rvvarisasahasrāṇi Iṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . srī bīramenisida dasavina hīcaga
Uṁḍaṁgaṁ hammikabbega rōcakamane puṭṭida gaḍa khēcaracakrado
ḷasava haḷḷagauṁḍa . puṭṭuUduṁ guṇa Aṁmmuḷe baṭṭaji dasa Adaṭu dā
na dha¨rṁmmamameṁbī neṭṭana pe¨rddaḷ guṇa Oḍavuṭṭidavene haḷḷagāUṁḍana
neṁdu pūgaḷdapudu jaga . Iṭṭaḍe vinisillakaraṁ piridī
ya balla tūḷdaṭṭi vairiyaṁ kolva dha¨rmmamanolda gūḍi
ṭṭara māriya janana bāriya Āsvadādhikāriya neṭṭane dhātri baṇni
pudu haḷḷagauUṁḍana nādigauṁḍana . suputra kuḷadīpaka
gāvari huliyaṁmmaneṭṭi naṁdiyaṁ naṁdi maṁṭapamaṁ māḍisida .
svasti śrīmatu cāḷukya vikrama kālada 10 neya duṁdukhi
saṁvatsara Āśāḍa suddha 8 mi sōmavāra dvitīpātadaṁdu bā
ca gāUṁḍana suputra kuladīpaka gōtrakalpavṛkṣa sivapādasē
khara haḷḷagāUṁḍa hosavoḷala śrīmūlastānadēva¨rgge
ya keṟeya keḷagaṇa kōḍala nāgarāsipaṁḍita¨rgge dhārā
pū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa sa¨rvvabādhaparihāravāgi caṁdrā¨rkatā
raṁbaraṁ .
Digital edition of SII 15.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
